name: praxis-reverse-engineering
description: Authorized reverse engineering workflows for evidence-driven analysis, clean-room reconstruction, and decompiler-assisted research.

interface.shortDescription: Authorized reverse engineering and decompiler-assisted research.
interface.longDescription: A Praxis product/plugin mode for legitimate reverse engineering tasks with authorization capture, evidence ledgers, toolchain diagnostics, decompiler artifact handling, black-box probes, parity checks, and clean-room implementation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Start an authorized reverse engineering evidence plan
Start a safety red-team evaluation without bypass payloads
Convert findings into a clean-room implementation plan
